name: speckit-pro
description: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development workflows for Codex, including coaching, setup, autopilot execution, status dashboards, and PR review resolution.

interface.longDescription: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development for Codex. Install explicit slash-command entrypoints for coaching, setup, autopilot execution, status dashboards, and PR review remediation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use SpecKit Pro to coach SDD, set up a spec, run autopilot, check status, or resolve PR feedback
